emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge
emails.body: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge I did not get a suspend report last week. I need one today by 1:00 pm. thanks. Jeff

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge
emails.body: Sorry about last week. I will make sure you get one today and find out what happened last week.

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge
emails.body: I don't understand the times on the report. many of them are 3 or 4 in the morning.

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge
emails.body: Those would be products managed out of London.

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge
emails.body: yes, but no one is in the office at that time. I'm confused.

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge
emails.body: Savita, I don't understand these reports. Can you get on my calendar this week so we can go over them? thanks. Jeff

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline- Change to Autohedge
emails.body: Hi Jeff, The times shown on the report are Houston time and converting it to London time it would approximately be 9.30 a.m. there. Savita
